description:
A Download Manager that speeds up your downloads.

AB Download Manager is a desktop app which lets you manage and organize your download files better than before.
1.6.1
This release contains small fixes.
Please see release notes of v1.6.0 for recent changes.
Fixed
- Application shortcut in Windows have no icon
Improved
- Translations updated
this release only contains smal fixes please see the 1.6.0 for changelog
